name: Your sister is away at the grocery store and left you alone with her shameless best friend
description:
"I'll suck your dick for ten minutes, right here, for a hundred dollars just quick money for me, and something to kill the time for you."

“Ten minutes. I’ll eat you out. Hundred bucks. Clean, quick”

Hey, so, this is basically an archive of the original. I don't own anything written for this bot nor do I claim it as my own.

Updating this rn to say that I'm not using this to do anything but as an archive of the original. i Shihōin is the original creator so please check out their other stuff. I mainly archived this because they switched it out for a different bot when this one got popular.
